objective: opencodex v2-gated ultra 노출 + ocx v2 토글 표면: max-native 모델은 max 항상+ultra는 multi_agent_v2 on일 때만, mock-max 모델은 mock max 비노출+ultra iff v2 (off면 xhigh/high 상단); catalog.ts ultra 주입 3지점 게이트 + 전 방출 경로 strip; src/codex/features.ts config.toml 판독(read-only); ocx v2 on|off|status CLI(codex features enable/disable 경유, agents.max_threads 경고, invalidateCodexModelsCache, 재시작 안내); GET/PUT /api/v2 엔드포인트; on/off 카탈로그 스냅샷 테스트. 설계 문서: devlog/260709_v2_gated_ultra/000_design.md (codexclaw dev2 유닛에서 이관). 이 goalplan은 별도 ocx 패치 트랙 소유 — codexclaw dev2 루프와 분리.

workPhases.title: v2 state reader + catalog ultra gate

tasks.title: catalog.ts: gate 3 ultra injection points + stripUltraWhenV2Off at shared emission (native max untouched)
tests: features parser + catalog on/off snapshots (routed, gpt-5.5, 5.6-sol, luna)

workPhases.title: toggle surface: ocx v2 CLI + /api/v2 endpoint

tasks.title: NEW src/cli/v2.ts + index.ts dispatch (codex features enable/disable, max_threads warning, cache invalidation, restart note)
full opencodex suite green (regressions incl. codex-catalog*.test.ts)
live: curl 10100 /api/v2, ocx v2 status; system left v2 ON

criteria.scenario: catalog emits ultra iff multi_agent_v2 enabled: OFF strips ultra everywhere (routed+natives incl 5.6-sol native ultra), native max unchanged, luna unchanged, no mock max emitted
criteria.expectedEvidence: passing on/off snapshot tests + fixture-triggered strip assertions
criteria.capturedEvidence: bun test tests/codex-v2-gate.test.ts: 11 pass 0 fail — v2 OFF strips ultra on routed(glm)+gpt-5.5+sol(native ultra) with sol keeping max, luna ladder unchanged [low..max], sync choke-point test proves preserved-genuine-native bypass branch strips (default_reasoning_level repaired ultra->high); no mock max emitted in any state. Full regression: 1735 pass 0 fail (176 files), tsc --noEmit clean.

criteria.scenario: features.ts reads table + boolean forms, absent->false, CODEX_HOME override; never writes
criteria.expectedEvidence: passing parser tests with temp fixtures
criteria.capturedEvidence: features parser tests pass: table form, [features] boolean form, inline-table form, absent file/key->false, sibling-key no-leak (multi_agent vs multi_agent_v2), header-boundary no-bleed; explicit configPath fixtures (hermetic, no real HOME read). Module contains zero write calls (read-only by construction).

criteria.scenario: ocx v2 status|on|off and GET/PUT /api/v2 flip via codex features CLI with max_threads warning + models cache invalidation; catalog build path contains no config write
criteria.expectedEvidence: CLI/endpoint test output + live smoke transcript
criteria.capturedEvidence: ocx v2 status live from source: "multi_agent_v2: ON — picker advertises ultra..."; toggle flow = codex features enable|disable + syncModelsToCodex resync (NOT invalidate-only, A-gate blocker 2 folded) + max_threads warning + restart note; PUT /api/v2 same routine via refreshCodexCatalogBestEffort; catalog build path imports features read-only, no auto-flip (isMultiAgentV2Enabled called only at syncCatalogModels + /v1/models boundary).

criteria.scenario: full suite green, live 10100 smoke returns enabled:true, system ends v2 ON
criteria.expectedEvidence: suite output + curl output + codex features list
criteria.capturedEvidence: Full suite 1735 pass 0 fail + tsc clean. Handler-level smoke: handleManagementAPI(GET /api/v2) -> 200 {"enabled":true,"agentsMaxThreadsConflict":false}. LIVE 10100 note (honest limitation): running proxy is the pre-patch build — curl /api/v2 hits the GUI static catch-all (HTML), so the endpoint goes live on the next ocx restart/update; NOT restarted now because the current codex sessions route through this proxy (NEEDS_HUMAN-adjacent risk avoided deliberately). codex features list: multi_agent_v2 true — system left v2 ON.
